DA MOT TO INCREASE BAIL FILED AT INSIST

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/X:SENTENCE IS AS TO COUNT 1 AND 2,/CCC:COUNT 1 AND COUNT 2/CH1:PROB 5 Y:PJ 6M/CTS:2/X:DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE BALANCE OF SENTENCE IN A 60 DAY RESIDENTIAL  TREATMENT PROGRAM FOLLOWED BY/X:A 4 MONTH INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT TREATMENT PROGRAM,/ /X:(COURT NOTES DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY COMPLETED THE 60 DAY RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM,)/X:DEFENDANT SHALL REMAIN ON LCAHOME DETENTION FOR 6 MONTHS WITH THE USE OF A SCRAM DEVICE,/LVAL/LCHEM/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE AN 18 MONTH MULTIPLE OFFENDER PROGRAM OVERSEEN BYDEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES,/X:DEFENDANT'S DRIVER'S LICENSE SHALL BE REVOKED FOR A PERIOD OF 4 YEARS,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $595 PLUS$1,799 IN ASSESSMENTS  FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $2,394,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAYA $50 ALCOHOL LAB FEE PURSUANT TO PC 1463,14(B),/VF1/MPROBFINE/PC/SECFEE40/ICNA/EMAT/CITE/CTORD:DEFENDANT MAY WORK MORE THAN 50 HOURS PER WEEK ANDWORK PAST 9:00 P,M/X:DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND UP TO 2 ALCOHOLICS ANONYMOUS SESSIONS PER DAY AND AN ALUMNI SESSION THROUGH DIABLO VALLEY RANCH ONCE PER MONTH,/X:DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND 1 HOUR OF CHURCH PER WEEK AND IS PERMITTED TOATTEND A WEDDING IN SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA FROM 10-21-11 TO 10-22-11,/X:ORDERFILED IN COURT,/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/BE/CONTD:OUTPATIENT PROGRAM STATUS/DOP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/

/CAL:TO SET SENTENCING/X:PLEA OPEN WITH JUDGE DAVIS/CTORD:AMENDMENT OF LCA PROGRAM, 2 AA MEETINGS PER DAY, 1 HOUR CHURCH, AND ALUMNI MEETINGS, ORDERTO BE PREPARED BY DEFENSE COUNSEL BY 06-28-11/TWS/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/CTORD:DEFENDANT REPORT TO LCA FOR MONITORING UPON RELEASE FROM  RESIDENTIAL TREATEMENT,/TWS/ARBUCKLE/PRES:08-09-11/CONTD:SENTENCING AND PSR/DOP/X:PLEA FROM 05-13-11
